Advanced Technology Management (ADVTM) marked exceptional growth as a leading EV charger manufacturer, doubling distribution and installations to over 2000 locations in the last year.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company ADVTM revealed on August 9, 2024, that it has significantly increased its distribution and installation rate, more than doubling it in the past year. With over 2000 locations now under its belt, ADVTM is experiencing rapid growth and has been acknowledged as a top performer in the industry.

news.headline: Foresight Autonomous Holdings announces Q2 2024 financial results; leader in auto vision systems.
news.summary: In NESS ZIONA, Israel, on August 9, 2024, Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. (FRSX) released their financial results for the second quarter of 2024. Foresight, a leader in automotive vision systems, listed on Nasdaq and TASE, revealed their Q2 figures.

news.headline: LS Power to acquire Algonquin's large scale renewable business in deal worth undisclosed amount.
news.summary: In a statement issued on August 9, 2024, LS Power, a prominent firm in the North American power and energy infrastructure realm, revealed a recent deal with Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. The agreement was finalized with AQN, a notable entity listed on both the TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol AQN.

news.headline: Spy Jeffrey Epstein's "Black Book" to be auctioned by Alexander Historical Auctions in Maryland on August 16, 2024.
news.summary: On August 16th, 2024, Alexander Historical Auctions, based in Elkton, Maryland, will be auctioning off a notable criminal relic. The auction house is renowned globally for selling historic letters and documents. This upcoming auction will feature the personal item.

news.headline: Christian Widen joins Gateway Financial Partners as Director of Business Development bringing 25+ years of experience.
news.summary: In Glastonbury, Connecticut on August 9, 2024, Gateway Financial Partners, a leading hybrid registered independent advisory (RIA) firm, excitedly disclosed the selection of Christian Widen as their latest Director of Business Development. With an extensive background spanning more than 25 years, Christian's appointment marks a strategic move for the firm.

news.headline: Dr. Zekeh Gbotokuma outsources his economic philosophy to Rome's World Congress of Philosophy after book success.
news.summary: In Rome on August 9, 2024, Dr. Zekeh Gbotokuma celebrated receiving three prestigious international awards for his book "OBAMANOMICS AND FRANCISCONOMICS," published in 2022. The recognition culminated from a successful book launch at the Assisi 2022 Global Event alongside Pope Francis.

news.headline: Researchers at Pusan National University in South Korea use AI to develop advanced sound-dampening materials enhancing noise reduction in urban areas.
news.summary: A groundbreaking deep learning technique for inverse design has been developed, enabling the enhancement of intricate acoustic metamaterials and mechanical structures. Recently introduced in BUSAN, South Korea on August 9, 2024, this method is revolutionizing the way complex designs are optimized. In urban environments, noise pollution is a growing concern, most notably from traffic. This new method offers a ray of hope in addressing this issue by providing innovative solutions. Stay updated as this technique shapes the future of design with its advanced capabilities.

news.headline: Canadian Swaps Market sees about 28 bps of easing in September, little changed after jobs data.
Odyssey Marine Exploration reports Q2 2024 results, updates on projects. Close to conclusion of NAFTA arbitration case with Mexico.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Odyssey Marine Exploration, Inc. (NASDAQ: OMEX), a leading ocean exploration company focusing on discovering, developing, and extracting vital minerals to address worldwide issues, released its second-quarter outcomes for the period ending June 30, 2024. The company also shared insights on ongoing projects and upcoming strategies. They are in the final stages of the NAFTA arbitration case against Mexico related to the ExO Project, with the Tribunal's decision expected soon.

news.headline: PACE, LLC becomes first 8(a) small business to adopt NCMA's Contract Management Standard; announced on Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Reston, Virginia, PACE LLC (PACE), a notable SBA 8(a) and Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB), publicly discloses its embrace of the National Contract Management Association's (NCMA) Contract Management Standard® (CMS™). PACE is recognized as the pioneer 8(a) entity to make this move, aiming to enhance its contract management practices.

news.headline: Brain Ritual by KetoSwiss AG wins Optimal Health News Award for Most Innovative Brain Health Product of 2024.
news.summary: KetoSwiss AG's Brain Ritual brand was recently honored with the title of Most Innovative Brain Health Product of 2024 by Optimal Health News, a prominent digital publication. This recognition underscores Brain Ritual's exceptional focus on providing top-tier, evidence-based, natural remedies for migraines. This accolade highlights the brand's commitment to pioneering research in the field of brain health and solidifies its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Heartland Travel and Scotland Folk Tours partner for custom private tours in Scotland, creating a unique travel experience.
news.summary: In Stirling, United Kingdom on August 9, 2024, Heartland Travel, a company specializing in private tours of Scotland, has collaborated with Scotland Folk Tours to offer an exclusive tour experience. This partnership brings together two distinguished tour providers to offer customized private tours in Scotland.

news.headline: Inform Solutions releases new industry report on impact reporting trends in 2023. Providing insights on 2024.Total Characters: 97
news.summary: A company based in Seattle, Inform Solutions, revealed on August 9, 2024, the launch of their newest industry report. They are known for offering investment-ready brand foundations and strategic communications for startups. The report focuses on the 2023 trends in impact reporting across various sectors.

news.headline: Herc Holdings Inc. declares $0.665 dividend per share payable on Sep 6, 2024, to shareholders as of Aug 23, 2024.
news.summary: Herc Holdings, a prominent equipment rental provider in North America, has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.665 per share for its shareholders (NYSE: HRI). The dividend will be paid on September 6, 2024, to shareholders on record as of August 23, 2024. Established in 1965, Herc Holdings Inc. operates through its subsidiary Herc Rentals Inc. and currently has 428 locations.

news.headline: Bath & Body Works (BBWI) declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on Sept. 6, 2024.
news.summary: Bath & Body Works, Inc. headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, disclosed on August 9, 2024, that a regular quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share (NYSE: BBWI) is set to be paid out on September 6, 2024. Shareholders as of August 23, 2024, are eligible to receive this dividend.

news.headline: Above Food acquires The Redwood Group's Specialty Crop Food Ingredients Division in Montana for $34 million plus working capital.
news.summary: Above Food Ingredients Inc. has confirmed its acquisition of the Specialty Crop Food Ingredient Division of The Redwood Group, LLC in Montana for a total consideration of US$34,000,000 plus working capital. The deal includes US$8,100,000 in cash and 5,600,000 newly issued common shares of Above Food. The purchase agreement is subject to final closing adjustments and customary conditions. This acquisition aligns with Above Food's strategy to enhance its offerings through a vertically integrated supply chain, delivering unique ingredients and consumer products.

news.headline: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. declares $0.61 per share cash dividend, payable on Sep 24th to shareholders as of Sep 4th.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky-based Texas Roadhouse, Inc. (Nasdaq: TXRH) announced on August 8, 2024, that their Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.61 per share of common stock. This dividend will be paid out on September 24, 2024, to shareholders of record as of September 4, 2024.

news.headline: Surf Air Mobility closed a $35.2 million convertible security deal with GEM, convertible into a max of 8M shares.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) revealed the completion of the sale to GEM of a mandatory convertible security. The security, totaling $35.2 million, can be converted into up to 8,000,000 shares of the company's common stock. The decision to sell the security to GEM was made in consultation with the board of directors.

news.headline: China's mobile data set to grow at a CAGR of 5.4% during 2023-2028 driven by 5G subscriptions and rise in mobile data ARPU.
news.summary: A report on China's telecom industry has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report offers a summary of the current telecommunications market in China and forecasts key indicators until 2028. Updated yearly, it analyzes short-term opportunities, competitive landscape, and demand trends by service type and technology/platform in fixed telephony.

news.headline: Ad Hoc Creditor Committee announces support for Ukraine's Eurobond exchange offer and consent solicitation on Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in London, the Ad Hoc Creditor Committee of Holders of Ukraine's Eurobonds reaffirmed its unwavering backing for the Ukrainian Government. The committee expressed support for the exchange offer and consent solicitation initiated by Ukraine on that day. Their backing is crucial for the success of the initiative.

news.headline: Loop Media, Inc. (NYSE American: LPTV) faces delisting after NYSE American suspends trading of its common stock.
news.summary: In Glendale, California, Loop Media, Inc. disclosed that the NYSE American has suspended trading of the company's common stock (NYSE American: LPTV) as of August 8, 2024. Loop Media is a prominent multichannel streaming CTV platform offering a variety of content such as curated music videos, sports, news, premium entertainment channels, and digital signage for businesses. The NYSE Regulation of the NYSE American LLC notified Loop Media about the trading suspension.

news.headline: Alkami Technology, Inc. announces pricing of secondary offering, with stockholders selling common stock. Nasdaq: ALKT.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Plano, Texas, Alkami Technology, Inc. disclosed the pricing of its underwritten secondary offering. Alkami, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol ALKT, is a prominent provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions for U.S. financial institutions. This announcement outlines a significant step for Alkami as it looks to expand its market presence and capitalize on growth opportunities.

news.headline: NCR Voyix (NYSE: VYX) to participate in upcoming investor conferences, including Oppenheimer & Co. Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 12, 2024.
news.summary: NCR Voyix, a prominent digital commerce solutions provider, revealed its presence at upcoming investor conferences. The company, listed as VYX on NYSE, will be participating in the Oppenheimer & Co. Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 12, 2024. The event will be virtual, with David Wilkinson, the Chief Executive Officer, serving as the presenter. The format includes a Fireside Chat and 1x1 and Group Investor Meetings, with the presentation scheduled for 1:15 p.m. ET. Additionally, NCR Voyix will also feature in the Needham Fintech & Digital Transformation Virtual Conference.

news.headline: Aon plc appoints Admiral James Stavridis to Board of Directors, effective Aug. 15, 2024. #AON #AdmiralJamesStavridis
news.summary: Dublin, August 9, 2024 - Aon plc, a renowned professional services firm listed on the NYSE under the symbol AON, disclosed the appointment of Admiral James Stavridis to its Board of Directors, with the official commencement date set for August 15, 2024. The company expressed satisfaction in integrating Admiral Stavridis into Aon's Board...

Canadian Average Hourly Earnings YoY Actual 5.2% (Forecast 4.8%, Previous 5.60%)
Canadian Unemployment Rate Actual 6.4% (Forecast 6.5%, Previous 6.4%)
Canadian Participation Rate Actual 65% (Forecast 65.33%, Previous 65.3%)
AMC Networks' Q2 revenue down 7.8% to $625.9M, with $97M impairment hit. EPS fell 38.6% to $1.24. Domestic ops face declines.
news.summary: AMC Networks Inc (NASDAQ:AMCX) announced a 7.8% year-over-year revenue decrease in the fiscal second quarter of 2024, amounting to $625.9 million, surpassing analyst expectations of $601.3 million. The adjusted EPS of $1.24 also saw a decline of 38.6% compared to the previous year, falling short of the analyst consensus of $1.52.In terms of domestic operations, affiliate revenue dropped by 12% to $172 million due to a decrease in basic subscribers. Advertising revenues also decreased by 11% year over year to $149 million, attributed to expected linear ratings declines and a tough advertising market. Content licensing revenues also saw a decline of 18% to $67 million.For more information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 30-year mortgage rates plummet to 6.47%, recording the largest weekly drop this year, hitting a 15-month low.
news.summary: The primary mortgage rate experienced its most significant weekly drop of the year, reaching its lowest point in 15 months.

news.headline: X, owned by Elon Musk, halts data collection for AI training following EU watchdog’s request, impacting EU user data.
news.summary: Following legal proceedings in an Irish court, the Data Protection Commission announced that X has agreed to halt the processing of personal data belonging to European Union users for the purpose of training its artificial intelligence system.
